Templates › Contractor / Visitor Site Induction

📋 Contractor / Visitor Site Induction

Quick site induction for visitors, deliveries, and short-term contractors — sign-in and safety briefing in one form.

How to use: Keep this at the site entrance. Every visitor signs in before entering the site. All fields are editable — click any text to change it.

Click to upload logo
SITE INDUCTION — VISITOR / CONTRACTOR
Site: Site Address
Principal Contractor: Business Name
Site Manager: Name / Phone
Site Safety Briefing (reviewed before signing)
Emergency assembly point is at [location]
Emergency services: call 111. Site first aid kit at [location]
PPE required on site at all times: hard hat, hi-vis, safety boots
No entry to exclusion zones without site manager permission
Report all incidents and near misses to site manager immediately
No smoking, alcohol, or drugs on site at any time
Speed limit on site: 10 km/h — pedestrians have right of way
Visitors must be escorted at all times
Visitor / Contractor Sign-In Register
NameCompanyPurpose of visitTime inTime outSignature
All visitors must sign in and out. Health & Safety at Work Act 2015. TradieTools NZ — tradietools.nz

📋 Contractor / Visitor Site Induction

No sign-up required. Free forever.

How to use this template

  • Click any field to edit it
  • Fill in your business details first
  • Click "Download PDF" to save
  • Or click "Print" for a paper copy

Keep this at the site entrance. Every visitor signs in before entering the site.
